agents.description: List of configuration settings for AI agents

name.description: Unique identifier (client ID) for the agent

key.description: Authentication credential (bcrypt hash or SCRAM verifier)

allowed_statements.description: List of allowed SQL statement types (e.g. SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE)

allowed_tables.description: List of tables that the agent is allowed to access. If empty, all tables are allowed.

blocked_functions.description: List of functions that are blocked from execution (e.g. sleep, pg_sleep)

masked_columns.description: Map of tables to columns that should be masked (anonymized) in results

select_limit.description: Max rows returned by a SELECT query

max_execution_time_ms.description: Max execution time in milliseconds allowed for a query

rate_limit_burst.description: Max burst size for rate limiting

dialect.description: SQL dialect parser dialect to use for checking query AST

created_at.description: Timestamp when the agent configuration was created
